name: Spark
description: Connect Claude to Spark - read, draft, triage, and act on your email, calendars, meetings, and contacts.
long_description: Give Claude access to Spark on macOS so it can both answer questions about your workspace and act on it. Search and browse emails, list folders, read full threads with bodies and attachments, look up contacts, check calendar events, find mutual availability with teammates, and review meeting transcripts. With write access, Claude can also compose drafts (new, reply, forward, with attachments), post team chat comments on shared threads, triage messages (archive, pin, snooze, move, label, mark as done, share with team, assign and delegate), reclassify smart categories, and manage contacts (block/accept, category, important/primary, auto-summary). Tools are discovered dynamically from the running Spark Desktop app. Each account and shared inbox has its own access level - read-only or triage - configurable in Spark Desktop > Settings > AI Agents.

tools.name: accounts
tools.description: List all configured email accounts with their calendars, teams, and shared inboxes

tools.name: emails
tools.description: List emails with metadata, pagination, and Gmail-style filters

tools.name: search
tools.description: Search emails by topic using keyword and semantic matching

tools.name: thread
tools.description: Read a full email thread with headers, bodies, and attachments

tools.name: events
tools.description: List calendar events for a time range

tools.name: availability
tools.description: Find free time slots for scheduling

tools.name: contacts
tools.description: Search contacts by name or email

tools.name: team
tools.description: Show team info, members, and assignments

tools.name: meeting
tools.description: Read a meeting transcript summary, transcript, and notes

tools.name: draft
tools.description: Create or edit an email draft - new, reply, forward, or update; supports attachments and markdown body

tools.name: comment
tools.description: Post a team chat comment on a thread; auto-shares the thread if needed

tools.name: action
tools.description: Perform email actions - archive, pin, snooze, move, label, assign, share, mark as done, reclassify category, and more

tools.name: contact-action
tools.description: Manage contacts - block/accept, change category, mark important/primary, toggle auto-summary
